ksa_text: Design and maintain the analytics transformation layer, including staging models, intermediate transformations, conformed dimensions, fact tables, and consumption-ready data mart models for BI and analytics.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Data Architecture & Analytics KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.439) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Governance. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Governance roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for Director of Data Governance roles increasingly include Data Architecture & Analytics competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for Director of Data Governance now include Data Architecture & Analytics competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Data Architecture & Analytics task KSA is relevant to the Director of Data Governance based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
